name: llms-txt-advisor
description: Evidence-based advisory agent for llms.txt files — helps websites decide whether to ship llms.txt, audits existing files for the 15 documented anti-patterns, generates new files from curated templates, and produces deployment + stakeholder-communication artifacts. Grounded in three independent empirical studies (SE Ranking n=300k domains, OtterlyAI 90-day server logs, Search Engine Land 10-site test) — refuses to over-promise AI-citation lift. Supports 18 sectors, 13 languages, and any MCP connector via ~~category placeholders.

noAuth.description: Public read-only access for discovery and advisory queries. Server endpoint (Tier 2) is not yet deployed; this agent card is currently discovery-only.

skills.name: Cold-Start Interview
skills.description: Run the full configuration interview that writes the user's practice profile. Use when the user is ready to invest 15-20 minutes (or 2 minutes via --quick) actually configuring the plugin for their specific site. The only skill that writes the practice profile. Bounces back from any other skill if the profile is unconfigured.
examples: Configure llms-txt advisor for our marketplace site
Set up my profile
I don't have an llms.txt yet but I want to create one

skills.name: Setup Recommender
skills.description: Lower-commitment orientation skill — runs BEFORE cold-start for users just exploring. Asks 3 lightweight questions about role, site type, and primary language, then recommends which sector / language / connector / skill combination to start with. 2-minute alternative to the full interview.
examples: I just installed this plugin — where do I start?
Recommend a setup for me
What should I install first?

skills.name: Advise
skills.description: Main advisory router for general llms.txt questions and the disambiguation fallback for vague inputs. Cites the three empirical studies. Refuses to over-promise. Routes to specialized sub-skills when intent becomes clearer.
examples: Should I add llms.txt to our marketing site?
Is llms.txt actually worth it?
What's the SOTA on llms.txt in 2026?

skills.name: Audit Existing llms.txt
skills.description: Review an existing llms.txt file against best practices, spec compliance, and 15 documented anti-patterns. Severity-tagged findings (Critical / High / Medium / Low). Accepts URL or pasted content.
examples: Review my llms.txt at https://example.com/llms.txt
Audit this file: [pastes content]
What's wrong with my llms.txt?

skills.name: Generate llms.txt
skills.description: Generate a new llms.txt file from scratch based on the user's practice profile. Defaults to English file content; configurable to any of 13 supported languages. Includes optional Stripe-pattern instructions block, SEO routing, schema disclosure, and transactional guidance.
examples: Generate the llms.txt for our docs site
Create our llms.txt based on what we discussed
Build the llms.txt with the audit fixes applied

skills.name: Customize Section
skills.description: Update a specific section of the user's practice profile or an existing llms.txt file. Requires a named target. Bare verbs without targets are explicitly excluded — those route to advise for disambiguation.
examples: Update the SEO routing in our llms.txt
Add more cities to the city list
Fix the directives block

skills.name: Deploy
skills.description: Produce technical deployment guidance — Nginx / Apache / Caddy / Vercel / Netlify / Cloudflare Workers server config, CI validation pipeline wiring, robots.txt consistency checks, CDN purge strategy, monitoring setup. Produces deployment-scoped Jira tickets (technical scope only).
examples: How do I deploy our llms.txt to production?
Give me the Nginx config for serving llms.txt
Set up CI validation for our llms.txt

skills.name: Stakeholder Communication
skills.description: Draft stakeholder communication and written artifacts — emails to managers, SEO leads, dev teams, leadership; Jira ticket descriptions; status memos; recommendation memos. Cross-cultural professional communication in 13 supported languages. Default for all writing/drafting tasks.
examples: Draft an email to my manager explaining this work
Help me respond to our SEO expert's feedback
Write the stakeholder Jira ticket description

notes: Tier 1 (this file): static Agent Card published at /.well-known/agent-card.json per A2A v1.0 spec (a2a-protocol.org/latest/specification, March 2026).
Tier 2: scripts/a2a-server.py is a production FastAPI JSON-RPC + SSE server with SQLite persistence, Bearer auth, rate limiting, audit log; mock mode (default) and live mode (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).
Tier 3: scripts/a2a-client.py is an async A2AClient class + CLI (discover/send/stream/get/cancel/list) for outbound calls to other A2A agents.
The 'url' field above is a placeholder — replace with the actual public A2A endpoint URL when deploying.
Full A2A test suite: tests/ — 42 pytest cases covering all five JSON-RPC methods, auth, rate limit, persistence, SSE, audit log, client validation, and end-to-end loopback.
